title: oldenlandia arnottiana
intro: Oldenlandia arnottiana, also known as Chi-Sao or Mountain Tea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Oldenlandia arnottiana can be prepared as a tea by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, or in other herbal preparations such as tinctures or infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
